keywords.imageryPrompt: A dimly lit, rain-soaked cityscape seen through a window pane, with water droplets distorting the reflection of neon lights and passing cars.
Soft, amber streetlights cast long shadows in an empty urban alleyway, where puddles reflect the flickering glow from a distant cafe window.
A cold winter night with snowflakes gently falling over an abandoned city park. A lone matchbox sits on a bench, its cover slightly opened to reveal a single ember glowing inside.
Distant skyscrapers lit up against a darkening sky, seen through the foggy glass of an old telephone booth where outdated rotary phones sit unused and silent.
A series of unanswered voicemails piling up on an antique phone, with each message's timestamp fading into darkness like memories slipping away.
A half-lit match hovering between being extinguished or catching fire against a backdrop of swirling smoke that morphs into indistinguishable shapes.
Rain pelting down heavily onto cracked asphalt, creating turbulent waves in the puddles, reflecting chaotic patterns as if searching for answers.
Endless rows of dimly lit street lamps stretching out into the horizon on an empty road, with each light flickering off one by one into darkness.
A single glowing ember burns fiercely against a stormy night sky, defiant and unyielding in its determination to remain alight despite heavy rain.
A faint glimmer of sunlight breaking through thick clouds just before dawn, casting soft beams across the city streets below, hinting at new beginnings
